notes: 'is a quantifier prefix' -> def:quantifier-prefix (present); 'psi is quantifier-free' is carried by def:matrix-prenex (the matrix is exactly the quantifier-free trailing formula), since no standalone 'quantifier-free formula' node exists. The matrix<->prefix interlock is acyclic (matrix depends on prefix; prenex-formula depends on both) -- which is why not adding def:prenex-formula back into def:matrix-prenex at 0030 was correct (it would have cycled).
